vibe: Warm, organic, artisanal, modern editorial, vintage music poster. Mixing folk roots with a hint of rock energy.

typography.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-accent

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Overlapping editorial layouts to feel like a vintage zine or music poster.

components.cards: Flat design (no shadow), 1px solid border using border color, square or very slight rounded-sm edges. Internal padding p-8.
components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none), solid primary or accent background, hover state must invert or darken. Optional 1px border for secondary buttons.
components.inputs: Flat, bottom border only (editorial style) or fully outlined with 1px solid border. Background transparent or surface color. No focus rings, use border color change on focus.

visual_effects.texture: Add a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay across the entire body to mimic vintage paper.
visual_effects.borders: Use 1px borders extensively to create a structured, 'print-grid' aesthetic.
visual_effects.animations: Minimal and smooth. Fade-ins (framer-motion) and slow continuous scrolling (react-fast-marquee) for text ribbons.
visual_effects.hover_states: Text color shifts to accent (red), slight negative Y translation (-translate-y-1) for merch cards.

components_instructions.navigation: Solid background (#F6F4ED) with a 1px bottom border. Keep it clean. Logo on the left, links and CTA (Înscriere Lecții) on the right.
components_instructions.hero: Editorial layout. Large 'Cormorant Garamond' typography ('Bun venit la Note În Demisol'). High contrast. Use a 1px bordered grid layout to place the hero image alongside text.
components_instructions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for an editorial ribbon. Text: 'NOTE ÎN DEMISOL • TRUPĂ FOLK-ROCK • ÎNFIINȚATĂ 2024 • 36 MEMBRI •'. Style: uppercase, tracking-widest, text-sm, border-y 1px.
components_instructions.about: Asymmetrical layout mixing text and images to highlight the scale of the band (36 members). Focus on the 'folk with a rock tendency' narrative.
components_instructions.merch: Simple grid (cols-1 md:cols-2 lg:cols-4). Cards with product image, title, and price. No 'add to cart' button, just 'Află mai multe' or 'Comandă prin mesaj'.
components_instructions.contact_and_lessons: Two-column bento style. Left side: General contact. Right side: Guitar lessons sign-up form with a moody acoustic guitar image.

hero_image.description: Folk band playing outdoors, capturing the organic and lively essence.

guitar_lessons.description: Close up of a musician strumming an acoustic guitar. Warm lighting.

merch_tshirt.description: Minimalist white t-shirt mockup flat lay.

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, buttons, form inputs, and links MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='nav-about-link').
